boundary: BOUNDARY := not (solution contract inhabited or restricted current theorem constructed or global current conservation proved)

logical_scope.meaning: unconditional only after an inhabitant supplies every restricted solution-field premise

current_definition.derivation: nabla_mu J_E_s^mu = (nabla_mu T_total_s^{mu nu}) * tau_s_nu + T_total_s^{mu nu} * nabla_(mu tau_s_nu)

required_solution_fields.requirement: accepted nonempty bounded spacetime region with verified boundary
verified Lorentzian metric and compatible covariant derivative on SupportCandidateB0
closed field-plus-detector action with no omitted external energy-momentum source
verified invariance under the declared spacetime translation generated by tau_B0
field and detector configuration satisfies all equations of motion derived from S_total_B0
complete matter, field, detector, and interaction stress-energy inventory
verified symmetry of the selected total stress-energy tensor
verified on-shell covariant conservation throughout SupportCandidateB0
globally defined covector field on SupportCandidateB0
verified Killing equation using the declared symmetrization convention
verified absence or complete accounting of energy-momentum flux through the support boundary

restricted_theorem_target.proof_route: rewrite the current divergence by the covariant product rule, then use stress-energy symmetry, covariant conservation, and the Killing equation

dimensional_boundary.observable_status: cE may denote a non-energy scaled or vector-flux observable

blocked_promotions: solution input contract -> verified total action
solution input contract -> translation invariance verified
solution input contract -> equations of motion solved
solution input contract -> complete stress-energy inventory
solution input contract -> stress-energy symmetry verified
solution input contract -> covariant conservation verified
solution input contract -> Killing condition verified
solution input contract -> boundary flux closure verified
solution input contract -> restricted current theorem constructed
solution input contract -> global current conservation theorem
solution input contract -> E = m c^3 energy law
non_claims: does not supply a metric or connection
does not supply a total action
does not solve equations of motion
does not supply a complete total stress-energy tensor
does not prove covariant stress-energy conservation
does not supply a Killing covector
does not prove the Killing equation
does not verify boundary flux closure
does not construct the restricted current theorem
does not prove model-independent current conservation
does not establish E = m c^3 as an energy law
next_weakest_point: Construct one bounded candidate inhabitant-field inventory without inhabiting the solution contract or proving current conservation.
